scope: GSC-only (Google Search Console + keyword master list). Competitor #1-blocker and AI-visibility sections remain manual and are not auto-generated here.
wins: Core local term 'bariatric counseling san antonio' holds the #2-3 tier at position 3.0 - BCC's strongest defended commercial keyword.
'weight loss counseling or therapy' improved the most among page-1 terms, up +4.2 to position 7.0.
'bariatric surgery counseling' rose +1.1 to 9.0 and carries the most impressions of any page-1 mover (7 impressions); 'bariatric therapist' also gained +1.3 to 6.7.
Two blog/service pages pull the most page-1 visibility: the FAQ page (108 impressions @ avg 14.8) and the bariatric-surgery psychological-support guide (104 impressions @ 10.6).
5 tracked keywords now sit in the #4-10 (page-1) tier.
needs_attention: Keyword coverage: 15 of 82 tracked KEYWORDS show GSC impressions; 67 show none. This is a KEYWORD count, not a page count - many keywords share one target page, so it does not imply 67 missing or unpublished pages. Only 2 of 50 distinct target pages in keywords-master.json still point at staging URLs, so tracker-hygiene drift is now minimal.
Near-zero CTR: 236 impressions produced 0 clicks in the latest snapshot - visibility is not converting to sessions.

'bariatric counseling' slipped -5.6 to position 11.0, falling off page 1, on 8 impressions (a real commercial term); 'bariatric counseling near me' also dropped -4.2 to 11.2 (5 impressions) and 'bariatric counselor' fell -4.0 to 8.0.

Visibility drift across the timeline: first snapshot (2026-05-07) showed 2,447 impressions @ avg position 14.87 vs the latest (2026-07-23) at 236 impressions @ 19.86 - impressions down and average position weaker, though single-day snapshots swing heavily.
CAVEAT: most tracked terms register only 1-8 impressions per day, so individual positions and deltas swing day to day and are directional only, not precise rank readings.
priority_actions: Fix the 0-click CTR: add clear CTAs and internal links from the two highest-impression assets (bariatric-surgery guide, 104 impressions; FAQ page, 108 impressions) into the matching service/booking pages.

Defend and recover the core bariatric terms that slipped off page 1 - on-page refresh for 'bariatric counseling' (-5.6 to 11.0) and 'bariatric counseling near me' (-4.2 to 11.2), and keep protecting 'bariatric counseling san antonio' at #3.
Tracker hygiene: repoint the 2 remaining staging targetUrls in keywords-master.json to their correct live www URLs so GSC can match them.
If a staging->prod publish backlog is in play, confirm the real push list via a staging-vs-prod sitemap diff or Daniel's own notes before acting - do not infer a page count from GSC/keyword data.
Add/verify FAQ schema on high-impression pages to improve rich-result and AI-overview eligibility.
summary: Core local term 'bariatric counseling san antonio' holds #3 and several bariatric terms sit page-1, but 236 impressions drove 0 clicks and 'bariatric counseling' / 'near me' slipped off page 1 - so the priority is converting existing page-1 visibility (CTAs/internal links) and defending the slipped commercial terms. Coverage is 15 of 82 tracked keywords with data (a keyword count, not a page count); only 2 of 50 target pages still point at staging.
